---
name: Game Request
about: Request a game to be added to the known games database
title: "[Game] "
labels: game-database
assignees: ''
---

## Game Information

- **Game title:**
- **Executable name:** (check Task Manager while the game is running, e.g., `elitedangerous64.exe`)
- **Launcher:** (Steam / Epic / GOG / Other)

## Additional context

- Does the game benefit from V-Cache? (yes / not sure / no)
- Any known anticheat concerns? (e.g., EAC, BattlEye, Vanguard)
- Any notes about the executable? (e.g., different exe for DX11 vs DX12, launcher exe vs game exe)
